```{r}
# Check relationship between fire count and Ho in areas of intermediate frequency fire
check_df <- 
  fire_mod_df %>%
  left_join(get_het())

pdf(here(plotpath,"fire_frq_check.pdf"), width = 8, height = 3)
ggplot(check_df, aes(x = frq_max, y = Ho)) +
geom_boxplot(aes(group = frq_max)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~fire_frq)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# Check vegetation type vs historical vs contemporary fire frequency
maj_cats <- mod_df %>% dplyr::count(evt) %>% arrange(desc(n)) %>% filter(n > 10) %>% pull(evt)
evt_check <-  
  mod_df %>%
  mutate(evt_simple = 
    case_when(
      evt %in% maj_cats ~ evt,
      TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  mutate(evt_simple = factor(evt_simple, levels = c("Shrubland", "Exotic Herbaceous", "Conifer", "Hardwood", "Riparian", "Developed", "Other"))) %>%
  mutate(frq_simple = 
    case_when(
      fire_frq == "No Fire/Low Frequency" ~ "No Fire/Low",
      fire_frq == "Intermediate Frequency" ~ "Intermediate",
      fire_frq == "High Frequency" ~ "High"
    )) %>%
  mutate(frq_simple = factor(frq_simple, levels = c("No Fire/Low", "Intermediate", "High")))

# proportions of EVT within each (fire_recent x frq_simple)
prop_df <-
  evt_check %>%
  filter(!is.na(frq_simple), !is.na(fire_recent), !is.na(evt_simple)) %>%
  count(fire_recent, frq_simple, evt_simple, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(fire_recent, frq_simple) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()


png(here(plotpath,"fire_recent_evt_check.png"), width = 12, height = 4, units = "in", res = 300)
plt1 <-
  ggplot(evt_check, aes(x = frq_simple, y = Ho)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = fire_recent)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = evt_simple, group = fire_recent), position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.5, dodge.width = 0.8), alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(x = make_pretty_names("fire_frq"), fill = make_pretty_names("fire_recent"), col = make_pretty_names("evt")) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo", begin = 0.05, direction = -1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Burned" = "gray", "Unburned" = "white")) +
  theme_classic()

plt2 <- 
  ggplot(prop_df, aes(x = fire_recent, y = prop, fill = evt_simple)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ frq_simple, nrow = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = make_pretty_names("fire_frq"),
    y = "Proportion of samples",
    fill = make_pretty_names("evt")
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.8),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.0, "lines")
  ) +
   scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo", begin = 0.05, direction = -1)

plot_grid(plt1, plt2, nrow = 1)
dev.off()
```

# Create supplementary tables
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Make Tables S2–S6 from final_model + emmeans contrasts
# Writes one TSV per table
# ============================================================

# ---- helpers ----
sig_stars <- function(p) {
  case_when(
    p < 0.001 ~ "***",
    p < 0.01  ~ "**",
    p < 0.05  ~ "*",
    p < 0.1   ~ "·",
    TRUE      ~ ""
  )
}

fmt_e <- function(x, digits = 2) formatC(x, format = "e", digits = digits)

# For Table S2 term prettifying (tailored to your exact model terms)
pretty_term_S2 <- function(term) {
  case_when(
    term == "(Intercept)" ~ "Intercept",
    term == "glacierInsideGlacier" ~ "Glacier (inside/outside)",
    term == "gHM" ~ "Human modification",
    term == "bio1" ~ "Contemporary temperature",
    term == "tmean_dif" ~ "Contemporary temperature change",

    term == "poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)1" ~ "Paleoclimate stability (linear)",
    term == "poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)2" ~ "Paleoclimate stability (quadratic)",

    str_detect(term, "^evt") ~ paste0("Contemporary vegetation: ", str_replace(term, "^evt", "")),
    term == "fire_frqIntermediate Frequency" ~ "Historical fire frequency (Intermediate)",
    term == "fire_frqHigh Frequency" ~ "Historical fire frequency (High)",
    term == "fire_recentBurned" ~ "Contemporary fire (Burned)",
    term == "fire_frqIntermediate Frequency:fire_recentBurned" ~ "Fire frequency × Contemporary fire (Intermediate)",
    term == "fire_frqHigh Frequency:fire_recentBurned" ~ "Fire frequency × Contemporary fire (High)",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

# output folder (change if you want)
out_dir <- here::here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs", "tables")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ============================================================
# Table S2 | Final model statistics
# ============================================================
tab_S2 <-
  broom::tidy(final_model) %>%
  # keep the terms you listed; drop intercept if you want
  filter(term %in% c(
    "glacierInsideGlacier","gHM","bio1",
    "poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)1","poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)2",
    "tmean_dif",
    "evtAgricultural","evtConifer","evtDeveloped","evtGrassland","evtHardwood","evtRiparian","evtSparsely Vegetated",
    "fire_frqIntermediate Frequency","fire_frqHigh Frequency",
    "fire_recentBurned",
    "fire_frqIntermediate Frequency:fire_recentBurned",
    "fire_frqHigh Frequency:fire_recentBurned"
  )) %>%
  transmute(
    Predictor = pretty_term_S2(term),
    Estimate = fmt_e(estimate, 2),
    `Std. Error` = fmt_e(std.error, 2),
    `t-value` = round(statistic, 3),
    `p-value` = paste0(format.pval(p.value, digits = 3, eps = 0.001), " ", sig_stars(p.value)) %>% str_trim()
  )

readr::write_tsv(tab_S2, file.path(out_dir, "Table_S2_final_model_statistics.tsv"))

# ============================================================
# Table S3 | EMM contrasts for historical fire frequency
# ============================================================
emm_frq <- emmeans(final_model, ~ fire_frq, mode = "df.error")

tab_S3 <-
  contrast(emm_frq, method = "tukey", adjust = "tukey") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  transmute(
    Contrast = contrast,
    Estimate = fmt_e(estimate, 2),
    `Std. Error` = fmt_e(SE, 2),
    df = df,
    `t-value` = round(t.ratio, 3),
    `p-value` = paste0(format.pval(p.value, digits = 3, eps = 0.001), " ", sig_stars(p.value)) %>% str_trim()
  )

readr::write_tsv(tab_S3, file.path(out_dir, "Table_S3_fire_frq_contrasts.tsv"))

# ============================================================
# Table S4 | EMM contrasts for contemporary fire within each fire_frq
# (No adjustment; 2 levels only)
# ============================================================
emm_recent_by_frq <- emmeans(final_model, ~ fire_recent | fire_frq, mode = "df.error")

tab_S4 <-
  contrast(emm_recent_by_frq, method = "pairwise") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  transmute(
    `Historical fire frequency` = fire_frq,
    Contrast = contrast,
    Estimate = fmt_e(estimate, 2),
    `Std. Error` = fmt_e(SE, 2),
    df = df,
    `t-value` = round(t.ratio, 3),
    `p-value` = paste0(format.pval(p.value, digits = 3, eps = 0.001), " ", sig_stars(p.value)) %>% str_trim()
  )

readr::write_tsv(tab_S4, file.path(out_dir, "Table_S4_fire_recent_within_fire_frq.tsv"))

# ============================================================
# Table S5 | EMM contrasts for fire_frq within each fire_recent
# (You said you’re using tukey)
# ============================================================
emm_frq_by_recent <- emmeans(final_model, ~ fire_frq | fire_recent, mode = "df.error")

tab_S5 <-
  contrast(emm_frq_by_recent, method = "pairwise", adjust = "tukey") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  transmute(
    `Contemporary fire` = fire_recent,
    Contrast = contrast,
    Estimate = fmt_e(estimate, 2),
    `Std. Error` = fmt_e(SE, 2),
    df = df,
    `t-value` = round(t.ratio, 3),
    `p-value` = paste0(format.pval(p.value, digits = 3, eps = 0.001), " ", sig_stars(p.value)) %>% str_trim()
  )

readr::write_tsv(tab_S5, file.path(out_dir, "Table_S5_fire_frq_within_fire_recent.tsv"))

# ============================================================
# Table S6 | EMM contrasts for contemporary vegetation (all pairs, Tukey)
# ============================================================
emm_evt <- emmeans(final_model, ~ evt, mode = "df.error")

tab_S6 <-
  contrast(emm_evt, method = "tukey", adjust = "tukey") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  transmute(
    Contrast = contrast,
    Estimate = fmt_e(estimate, 2),
    `Std. Error` = fmt_e(SE, 2),
    df = df,
    `t-value` = round(t.ratio, 3),
    `p-value` = paste0(format.pval(p.value, digits = 4, eps = 0.0001), " ", sig_stars(p.value)) %>% str_trim()
  )

readr::write_tsv(tab_S6, file.path(out_dir, "Table_S6_evt_contrasts.tsv"))

# ============================================================
# Done: prints paths
# ============================================================
list.files(out_dir, pattern = "^Table_S[2-6].*\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

```

# Variance partioning analysis
```{r}
# Calculate shared variance
block_varpart_exact_shared <- function(model, blocks) {
  stopifnot(inherits(model, "lm"))
  get_R2 <- function(m) summary(m)$r.squared
  all_terms <- attr(terms(model), "term.labels")

  # build formulas for each subset of blocks
  block_names <- names(blocks)
  block_terms <- blocks

  # R2 for model using union of terms in a subset of blocks
  r2_subset <- function(use_blocks) {
    rhs <- unique(unlist(block_terms[use_blocks]))
    rhs <- intersect(rhs, all_terms)
    m <- update(model, as.formula(paste(". ~", paste(rhs, collapse = " + "))))
    get_R2(m)
  }

  # unique for block i = R2(all blocks) - R2(all blocks except i)
  uniq <- purrr::map_dbl(block_names, \(b) {
    r2_subset(block_names) - r2_subset(setdiff(block_names, b))
  })

  # full for the block i = R2(block i alone)
  full <- purrr::map_dbl(block_names, \(b) {
    r2_subset(b)
  })

  tibble(
    block = block_names,
    R2_unique = uniq,
    R2_full = full
  )
}

# Calculate interaction contribution
no_interact_model <- update(final_model, . ~ . - fire_frq:fire_recent)
R2_main <- summary(no_interact_model)$r.squared
R2_full <- summary(final_model)$r.squared
R2_interaction_increment <- R2_full - R2_main
R2_interaction_increment

# Calculate variance for each block without interaction
blocks_nointeract <- list("fire_frq", "fire_recent", "evt", "bio1", "tmean_dif", "poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)", "glacier", "gHM")
names(blocks_nointeract) <- make_pretty_names(blocks_nointeract)

# Calculate unique variance explained
vp <- block_varpart_exact_shared(no_interact_model, blocks_nointeract)
vp

# add R2_interaction_increment to recent fire and historical fire
vp <- 
  vp %>%
  mutate(R2_unique = case_when(
    block == "contemporary fire" ~ R2_unique + R2_interaction_increment,
    block == "historical fire frequency" ~ R2_unique + R2_interaction_increment,
    TRUE ~ R2_unique
  ))

# Calculated shared and unexplained variance
shared_R2 <- R2_full - sum(vp$R2_unique)
unexplained_R2 <- 1 - R2_full
 
# Confirm sum to 100 and sum to original R2
stopifnot(sum(shared_R2, unexplained_R2, vp$R2_unique) == 1)
stopifnot(sum(shared_R2, vp$R2_unique) == R2_full)

# Combine
plot_df <- vp %>%
  transmute(component = block, pct_total = 100 * R2_unique) %>%          # R2 is fraction of TOTAL variance
  bind_rows(tibble(component = "unexplained", pct_total = 100 * unexplained_R2)) %>%
  bind_rows(tibble(component = "shared", pct_total = 100 * shared_R2)) %>%
  mutate(component = factor(component, levels = c(setdiff(component, "unexplained"), "unexplained"))) %>%
  mutate(kind = case_when(
    component == "shared" ~ "Shared",
    component == "unexplained" ~ "Unexplained",
    TRUE ~ "Unique"
  )) %>%
  # Capitalize first letter
  mutate(component = str_to_sentence(component)) %>%
  arrange(kind, pct_total) %>%
  mutate(component = factor(component, levels = unique(component)))


plot_df %>% group_by(kind, grepl("Contemporary", component)) %>% summarize(sum(pct_total))

png(here(plotpath, "variance_partioning.png"), width = 4.5, height = 3, res = 300, units = "in")
ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = "Varpart", y = component, fill = ifelse(component %in% c("Unexplained","Shared"), NA, pct_total))) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct_total, 2), "%")),
            size = 4, color = "black") +
  scale_met_cont(values = plot_df$pct_total[!plot_df$component %in% c("Unexplained","Shared")], extend_scale = 0.2) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "% Variance") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid   = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, color = "black")
  )
dev.off()

vp %>% mutate_at(vars(R2_unique, R2_full), ~ round(. * 100, 2))
```

# Plot maps of variables
```{r}
plot_points_map <- function(var, df) {
  df$fire_frq <- factor(
    df$fire_frq,
    levels = c("No Fire/Low Frequency","Intermediate Frequency","High Frequency"),
    labels = c("Low/No Fire","Intermediate","High")
  )
  plt_var <- 
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = ca_proj) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
    ) 
  if (is.numeric(df[[var]])){
    plt_var <- 
      plt_var <- plt_var + 
      geom_sf(data = df, aes_string(fill = var), size = 2, shape = 21) +
      scale_met_cont(df[[var]], aesthetic = "fill", extend_scale = 0.1)
  } else {
    if(length(unique(df[[var]])) <= 3){
      plt_var <- 
        plt_var + 
        geom_sf(data = df, aes_string(fill = var, shape = var), size = 2) +
        scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 24, 22)[1:length(unique(df[[var]]))]) + 
        labs(shape = gsub(" ", "\n", stringr::str_to_sentence(make_pretty_names(var)))) + 
        scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo", begin = 0.25, end = 0.75, direction = -1)
    } else {
      plt_var <- 
        plt_var + 
        geom_sf(data = df, aes_string(fill = var), size = 2, shape = 21) + 
        scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo", begin = 0.1, end = 0.9, direction = -1)
    }    
  }
  plt_var <- plt_var + labs(fill = gsub(" ", "\n", stringr::str_to_sentence(make_pretty_names(var)))) 
}

final_model_vars <- unique(final_model_vars)
png(here(plotpath, "final_model_variable_maps.png"), height = 15, width = 11, res = 300, unit = "in")
plt_list <- map(final_model_vars, ~(plot_points_map(.x, mod_sf_unique)))
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plt_list, ncol = 2, align = "hv", labels = LETTERS[1:length(final_model_vars)], label_size = 14)
dev.off()
```

# Comparison of variable importance via residuals
```{r}
# For each variable, build a model with all other variables and compare the residuals to the full model residuals
calc_var_resid <- function(x, mod_vars, df){
  # Base formula
  f <- reformulate(mod_vars, response = "Ho")
  f <- update(f, . ~ . + fire_frq:fire_recent)
  f <- update(f, . ~ . + poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE) - csi_past)

  # Subset formula
  other_vars <- setdiff(mod_vars, x)
  sub_f <- reformulate(other_vars, response = "Ho")
  if (grepl("csi_past", sub_f)){
    sub_f <- update(sub_f, . ~ . + poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE) - csi_past)
  }
  if (x != "fire_frq" & x != "fire_recent"){
    sub_f <- update(sub_f, . ~ . + fire_frq:fire_recent)
  }
  
  sub_model <- lm(sub_f, data = df)
  full_model <- lm(f, data = df)

  # Difference in fit
  sub_pred <- predict(sub_model)
  full_pred <- predict(full_model)
  pred_change <- full_pred - sub_pred

  return(tibble(
    pred_change = pred_change, 
    variable = x, 
    x = df$x, 
    y = df$y)
  )
}

var_resid <- map(sig_vars, ~calc_var_resid(.x, final_model_vars, mod_sf_unique), .progress = TRUE)

var_resid_df <- 
  var_resid %>% 
  bind_rows() %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 3310) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  mutate(pred_change_scaled = scale(pred_change)[,1]) 

pair_plot <- function(x, label = "") {
  y <- "pred_change"
  change <- var_resid_df %>% filter(variable == x) %>% pull(y)
  df <- mod_sf_unique %>% mutate(change = change)

  df$fire_frq <- factor(
    df$fire_frq,
    levels = c("No Fire/Low Frequency","Intermediate Frequency","High Frequency"),
    labels = c("Low/No Fire","Intermediate","High")
  )

  plt_scatter <-
    ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x]], y = Ho)) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = make_pretty_names(x), y = "Observed Heterozygosity") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

  if (is.numeric(df[[x]])) {
    plt_scatter <- plt_scatter +
      geom_point(aes(color = change), pch = 16, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.9) +
      geom_smooth(
        method = "lm",
        formula = if (x == "csi_past") y ~ poly(x, 2, raw = TRUE) else y ~ x,
        color = "black"
      ) +
      scico::scale_color_scico(palette = "roma", midpoint = 0, direction = -1) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")
  } else if (x == "fire_recent") {
    plt_scatter <- plt_scatter +
      geom_boxplot(aes(fill = fire_frq), position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
      geom_point(
        aes(color = change, group = fire_frq),
        position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.3, dodge.width = 0.8),
        size = 2, show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      scico::scale_color_scico(palette = "roma", midpoint = 0, direction = -1) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        name = "Historical fire frequency",
        values = c("Low/No Fire" = "white","Intermediate" = "gray30","High" = "gray60")
      ) +
      theme(
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
        legend.justification = c(0, 1)
      ) +
      ylim(NA, 1.5 * max(df$Ho, na.rm = TRUE))
  } else if (x == "fire_frq") {
    plt_scatter <- plt_scatter +
      geom_boxplot(aes(fill = fire_recent), position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
      geom_point(
        aes(color = change, group = fire_recent),
        position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.3, dodge.width = 0.8),
        size = 2, show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      scico::scale_color_scico(palette = "roma", midpoint = 0, direction = -1) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        name = "Contemporary fire",
        values = c("Unburned" = "white","Burned" = "gray")
      ) +
      theme(
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
        legend.justification = c(0, 1)
      )
  } else {
    plt_scatter <- plt_scatter +
      geom_boxplot() +
      geom_jitter(aes(color = change), pch = 16, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.9, width = 0.2, height = 0) +
      scico::scale_color_scico(palette = "roma", midpoint = 0, direction = -1) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")
  }

  plt_map <-
    ggplot(df) +
    geom_sf(data = ca_proj, fill = "white", colour = "gray", size = 0.5) +
    geom_sf(aes(color = change), pch = 16, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.9) +
    scico::scale_color_scico(palette = "roma", midpoint = 0, direction = -1) +
    theme_void() +
    labs(color = "Δ Predicted\nHeterozygosity") +
    theme(legend.position = "right")

  if (x == "evt") plt_scatter <- plt_scatter + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

  cowplot::plot_grid(plt_scatter, plt_map, nrow = 1, labels = c(label, ""), align = "h", rel_widths = c(0.45, 0.55))
}

png(here(plotpath, "variable_prediction_change_maps.png"), width = 3.5*2*2, height = 3*length(sig_vars)/2, units = "in", res = 300)
plts <- map(1:length(sig_vars), ~pair_plot(sig_vars[.x], label = LETTERS[.x]))
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plts, ncol = 2)
dev.off()

png(here(plotpath, "variable_prediction_change_maps.png"), width = 3.5*2, height = 3*length(sig_vars), units = "in", res = 300)
plts <- map(1:length(sig_vars), ~pair_plot(sig_vars[.x], label = LETTERS[.x]))
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plts, ncol = 1)
dev.off()
```



# Figures for MVZ

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
outpath = here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs")
plotpath = here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "plots")
mod_df <- read_csv(here(outpath, "model_df.csv"))
gg_df <- 
  mod_df %>%
  mutate(fire_recent = round(fire_recent, 0)) %>%
  mutate(fire_recent_cat = case_when(
    fire_recent == 0 ~ "No fire since 1984",
    fire_recent > 0 ~ "≥1 fire since 1984"
  )) %>%
  mutate(fire_frq = case_when(
    grepl("High Frequency", fire_frg) ~ "High",
    grepl("Intermediate Frequency", fire_frg) ~ "Intermediate",
    fire_frg == "Infrequent Fire Regime" ~ "Low/No Fire",
    fire_frg == "No Fire Regime" ~ "Low/No Fire",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  mutate(fire_frg = gsub("\\+ ", "\\+\n", fire_frg)) %>%
  mutate(
    fire_frq = factor(fire_frq, levels = rev(c("High", "Intermediate", "Low/No Fire"))),
    fire_recent_cat = factor(fire_recent_cat, levels = c("No fire since 1984", "≥1 fire since 1984")),
    fire_frg = factor(fire_frg, levels = rev(c("High Frequency +\nHigh Severity", "High Frequency +\nLow/Moderate Severity", "Intermediate Frequency +\nHigh Severity", "Intermediate Frequency +\nLow/Moderate Severity", "Infrequent Fire Regime", "No Fire Regime")))
  )

common_evt <- gg_df %>% count(evt) %>% arrange(desc(n)) %>% filter(n > 10) %>% pull(evt)
gg_df <- gg_df %>% mutate(evt_simple = ifelse(evt %in% common_evt, evt, "Other"))

mod_sf_unique_scaled$partial_resid_csi <-
  resid(gls_model1) +
  coef(gls_model1)["csi_past"] * mod_sf_unique_scaled$csi_past

b <- coef(gls_model1poly)
mod_sf_unique_scaled$partial_resid_csi_poly <-
  resid(gls_model1poly) +
  b["poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)1"] * mod_sf_unique_scaled$csi_past +
  b["poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)2"] * mod_sf_unique_scaled$csi_past^2

# Calc pseudo R2 for poly model
cor(predict(gls_model1poly), mod_sf_unique$Ho) # 0.72

plt_poly <- 
  ggplot(mod_df, aes(x = csi_past, y = Ho)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = csi_past)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2, raw = TRUE)) +
  theme_classic() +scale_color_viridis_c(option = "turbo") +
  labs(x = "Paleoclimate stability", y = "Heterozygosity") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)
  )

# Predicted vs observed plot
pred_obs_plt <-
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique_scaled, aes(x = predict(gls_model1poly), y = Ho)) +
  geom_point( size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
  labs(x = "Predicted heterozygosity", y = "Observed heterozygosity") +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top", size = 6) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)
  )

gls_model_simple <- gls(Ho ~ poly(csi_past, 2) + tmean_dif + bio1 + fire_frg + fire_recent, correlation = corExp(form = ~ x + y, nugget = FALSE), data = mod_sf_unique_scaled, method = "ML")
cor(predict(gls_model_simple), mod_sf_unique$Ho) # 0.72

lm(Ho ~ x + y, data = mod_sf_unique_scaled) %>% summary() # R2 = 0.35
lm(Ho ~ poly(csi_past, 2) + tmean_dif + bio1 + evt + fire_frg, data =mod_sf_unique_scaled) %>% summary() # R2 = 50

lm(Ho ~ poly(csi_past, 2) + tmean_dif + bio1 + evt + fire_frg + x + y, data =mod_sf_unique_scaled) %>% summary() # even including x and y, variables are still significant

map_csi_past <-
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique) +
  geom_sf(data = ca_proj, fill = "gray90", colour = NA, size = 2) +
  geom_sf(aes(col = csi_past), size = 2) +
  scale_met_cont(mod_sf$csi_past, aesthetic = "col") +
  labs(col = "Paleoclimate\nstability") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "inside",
    legend.justification = c(1, 1),
    legend.position.inside = c(0.9, 0.95),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12)
  )

mod_sf_unique$partial_resid_csi_poly <- mod_sf_unique_scaled$partial_resid_csi_poly
model_summary <- broom::tidy(gls_model1poly)

b1 <- model_summary %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)1")
b2 <- model_summary %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "poly(csi_past, 2, raw = TRUE)2")

beta1 <- formatC(b1$estimate, format = "e", digits = 2)
beta2 <- formatC(b2$estimate, format = "e", digits = 2)

p1_lab <- if (b1$p.value < 0.001) {
  "p[1] < 0.001"
} else {
  paste0("p[1] == ", round(b1$p.value, 3))
}

p2_lab <- if (b2$p.value < 0.001) {
  "p[2] < 0.001"
} else {
  paste0("p[2] == ", round(b2$p.value, 3))
}

line1 <- paste0("beta[1] == ", beta1, "*','~", p1_lab)
line2 <- paste0("beta[2] == ", beta2, "*','~", p2_lab)

label_txt <- paste0("atop(", line1, ",", line2, ")")

plt_poly_partial <- 
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique, aes(x = csi_past, y = partial_resid_csi_poly)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = csi_past)) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    formula = y ~ poly(x, 2, raw = TRUE),
    col = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_met_cont(mod_sf$csi_past, aesthetic = "col") +
  annotate(
    "text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1, vjust = 1,
    label = label_txt, parse = TRUE, size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Paleoclimate stability",
    y = "Partial residual heterozygosity"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.position = "none"
  )


csi_past_plt <- cowplot::plot_grid(plt_poly_partial, map_csi_past, nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.8))

q_plt <- ggplot(filter(mod_sf_unique, Q > 0.01), aes(x = csi_past, y = Q)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = csi_past)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "black",  formula = y ~ poly(x, 2, raw = TRUE)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_met_cont(mod_sf$csi_past, aesthetic = "col") +
  labs(x = "Paleoclimate stability", y = "Inbreeding coefficient (Q)") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)
  )

range(mod_sf_unique$Q)

mod_sf_unique <- mod_sf_unique %>%
  mutate(
    admix = if_else(Q > 0.001, "Admixed", "Non-admixed"),
    csi_past_bin = cut(csi_past, breaks = 8, include.lowest = TRUE)
  )

# get midpoints for labels
bin_levels <- levels(mod_sf_unique$csi_past_bin)
bin_mids <- sapply(bin_levels, function(s) {
  nums <- as.numeric(gsub("\\(|\\]|\\[|\\)", "", unlist(strsplit(s, ","))))
  mean(nums)
})
bin_lab <- sprintf("%.2f", bin_mids)  # change decimals here

count_df <- mod_sf_unique %>%
  count(csi_past_bin, admix, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(csi_past_bin) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n),
         admix = factor(admix, levels = c("Non-admixed", "Admixed"))) %>%
  ungroup()

count_df_fire <- mod_sf_unique %>%
  count(fire_frg, admix, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(fire_frg) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n),
         admix = factor(admix, levels = c("Non-admixed", "Admixed"))) %>%
  ungroup()

q_plt_prop <- 
  ggplot(count_df, aes(x = csi_past_bin, y = prop, fill = admix)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = bin_lab) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Non-admixed" = "tomato2", "Admixed" = "skyblue2")) +
  labs(x = "Binned paleoclimate stability", y = "Proportion of individuals", fill = "") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16)
  )

total_count <- count_df %>%
  group_by(csi_past_bin) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(n)) 

q_plt_count <- 
  ggplot(count_df, aes(x = csi_past_bin)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = prop, fill = admix)) +
  # Add text with counts to bars
  #geom_text(data = total_count, aes(label = total), y = 0.9, size = 6, color = "white") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = bin_lab) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Non-admixed" = "red2", "Admixed" = "skyblue2")) +
  labs(x = "Binned paleoclimate stability", y = "Number of individuals", fill = "") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16)
  )

pdf(here(plotpath, "mvz.pdf"), width = 5.5, height = 5)
q_plt_count
dev.off()

pdf(here(plotpath, "mvz.pdf"), width = 9, height = 4.5)
q_plt_count
csi_past_plt
q_plt
dev.off()

mod_sf_unique$partial_resid_csi_notpoly <-
  resid(gls_model1) +
  coef(gls_model1)["csi_past"] * mod_sf_unique_scaled$csi_past

plt_notpoly_raw <- 
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique, aes(x = csi_past, y = Ho)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x) +
  labs(x = "Paleoclimate stability", y = "Partial residual heterozygosity") +
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)
  )
plt_poly_raw <- 
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique, aes(x = csi_past, y = Ho)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2, raw = TRUE)) +
  labs(x = "Paleoclimate stability", y = "Partial residual heterozygosity") +
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)
  )


plt_notpoly <- 
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique, aes(x = csi_past, y = partial_resid_csi_notpoly)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x) +
  labs(x = "Paleoclimate stability", y = "Partial residual heterozygosity") +
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)
  )
plt_poly <- 
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique, aes(x = csi_past, y = partial_resid_csi_poly)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2, raw = TRUE)) +
  labs(x = "Paleoclimate stability", y = "Partial residual heterozygosity") +
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)
  )


mod_sf_unique$partial_resid_tmean_dif <-
  resid(gls_model1poly) +
  coef(gls_model1poly)["tmean_dif"] * mod_sf_unique_scaled$tmean_dif

# Get coefficient and p-value for annotation
model_summary <- broom::tidy(gls_model1poly)
beta <- formatC(model_summary$estimate[model_summary$term == "tmean_dif"], format = "e", digits = 2)
pval <- model_summary$p.value[model_summary$term == "tmean_dif"] %>% round(2)

tmean_dif_plt <-
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique, aes(x = tmean_dif, y = partial_resid_tmean_dif)) +
  geom_point(col = "orange2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Contemporary temperature change", y = "Partial residual heterozygosity") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
           label = paste0("beta == ", beta, "*','~p == ", pval), parse = TRUE, size = 6) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
pdf(here(plotpath, "mvz.pdf"), width = 5, height = 5)
tmean_dif_plt
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Recreate tuk_df from gls_model1poly (this is what you deleted)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

# helper to clean factor labels consistently
clean_lvl <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    as.character() %>%
    str_replace_all("[\r\n]+", " ") %>%  # remove line breaks
    str_squish() %>%                    # collapse whitespace
    str_remove("^\\(") %>%              # drop leading "("
    str_remove("\\)$")                  # drop trailing ")"
}


# emmeans + Tukey (tukey) on the GLS model
emm_fire <- emmeans(gls_model1poly, ~ fire_frg)
tuk <- pairs(emm_fire, adjust = "tukey")

# Convert to a "tuk_df" equivalent with group1/group2 columns + stars
tuk_df <- as.data.frame(tuk) %>%
  tidyr::separate(contrast, into = c("group1", "group2"), sep = " - ", remove = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    stars = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )

# If you only want significant comparisons:
tuk_df <- tuk_df %>% filter(stars != "ns")

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Map comparisons to x positions for plotting brackets on ggplot
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
gg_df2 <- gg_df %>%
  mutate(fire_frg_clean = clean_lvl(fire_frg),
         fire_frg_clean = factor(
           fire_frg_clean,
           levels = clean_lvl(levels(fire_frg))  # keep same ordering as fire_frg
         ))

lvls_key <- levels(gg_df2$fire_frg_clean)

tuk_df2 <- tuk_df %>%
  mutate(
    group1_key = clean_lvl(group1),
    group2_key = clean_lvl(group2),
    x1 = match(group1_key, lvls_key),
    x2 = match(group2_key, lvls_key),
    xmin = pmin(x1, x2),
    xmax = pmax(x1, x2),
    xmid = (xmin + xmax) / 2
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(xmin), !is.na(xmax))


# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot (kept): fire_frg vs Ho with significant Tukey brackets
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
mod_sf_unique$Ho_fire_frg_partial <- resid(gls_model1poly) +
  coef(gls_model1poly)["fire_frgInfrequent Fire Regime"] * (mod_sf_unique_scaled$fire_frg == "Infrequent Fire Regime") +
  coef(gls_model1poly)["fire_frgIntermediate Frequency + Low/Moderate Severity"] * (mod_sf_unique_scaled$fire_frg == "Intermediate Frequency + Low/Moderate Severity") +
  coef(gls_model1poly)["fire_frgIntermediate Frequency + High Severity"] * (mod_sf_unique_scaled$fire_frg == "Intermediate Frequency + High Severity") +
  coef(gls_model1poly)["fire_frgHigh Frequency + Low/Moderate Severity"] * (mod_sf_unique_scaled$fire_frg == "High Frequency + Low/Moderate Severity") +
  coef(gls_model1poly)["fire_frgHigh Frequency + High Severity"] * (mod_sf_unique_scaled$fire_frg == "High Frequency + High Severity")

mod_sf_unique <-  
  mod_sf_unique %>%
  mutate(fire_frg_lb = gsub("\\+ ", "\\+\n", as.character(fire_frg))) %>%
  mutate(
    fire_frg_lb = factor(fire_frg_lb, levels = rev(c("High Frequency +\nHigh Severity", "High Frequency +\nLow/Moderate Severity", "Intermediate Frequency +\nHigh Severity", "Intermediate Frequency +\nLow/Moderate Severity", "Infrequent Fire Regime", "No Fire Regime")))
  )
unique(mod_sf_unique$fire_frg_lb)


# y positions for brackets (stack them)
y_base <- max(mod_sf_unique$Ho_fire_frg_partial, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.0001
y_step <- 0.08 * diff(range(mod_sf_unique$Ho_fire_frg_partial, na.rm = TRUE))  # tweak if needed

tuk_df2 <- tuk_df2 %>%
  arrange(xmin, xmax) %>%
  mutate(
    y = y_base + row_number() * y_step,
    y_tick = y - 0.25 * y_step
  )


bxp2 <-
  ggplot(mod_sf_unique, aes(x = fire_frg_lb, y = Ho_fire_frg_partial)) +
  geom_boxplot(col = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(data = filter(mod_sf_unique, fire_frg != "Intermediate Frequency + High Severity")) +
  geom_boxplot(data = filter(mod_sf_unique, fire_frg == "Intermediate Frequency + High Severity"), col = "tomato2") +
  geom_jitter(data = filter(mod_sf_unique, fire_frg != "Intermediate Frequency + High Severity"), width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(data = filter(mod_sf_unique, fire_frg == "Intermediate Frequency + High Severity"), col = "tomato2", width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Historical fire regime", y = "Partial residual heterozygosity") +
  geom_segment(data = tuk_df2,
               aes(x = xmin, xend = xmax, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_segment(data = tuk_df2,
               aes(x = xmin, xend = xmin, y = y_tick, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_segment(data = tuk_df2,
               aes(x = xmax, xend = xmax, y = y_tick, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(data = tuk_df2,
            aes(x = xmid, y = y - 0.00005, label = stars),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, vjust = 0, size = 8) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1, size = 14),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 25)
  )

# If you want to save:
ggsave(here(plotpath, "fire_frg_tukey_gls.pdf"), bxp2, width = 10, height = 6)

```

```{r}
df = mod_sf_unique
df <- df %>% mutate(admixed = ifelse(Q > 0.01, 1, 0))

# admixed is binomial so use glm with family = binomial
admix_fit <- glm(admixed ~ csi_past + glacier + gHM + bio1 + tmean_dif + evt + fire_recent * fire_frq, data = df, family = "binomial")
car::Anova(admix_fit, type = 2)
admix_fit %>% broom::tidy() %>% filter(p.value < 0.05)

# Emmeans check on fire_recent
emmeans(admix_fit, ~ fire_recent | fire_frq) |>
  pairs() %>%  
  summary(infer = TRUE)
```


# DUMP
```{r}
df = mod_df

med_fit <- lm(Ho ~ veg_PC1 + veg_PC2 + veg_PC3 + bio1 + csi_past + glacier + gHM + tmean_dif + fire_severity + fire_recent +, data = df)
summary(med_fit)
```

```{r}
pdf(here(plotpath, "fire_groupveg_plots.pdf"), width = 5, height = 5)
ggplot(data = mod_sf_unique, aes(x = fire_severity, y = Ho)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = groupveg)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() 

ggplot(data = mod_sf_unique, aes(x = fire_severity, y = Ho)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = evt)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() 

# Boxplot with significance comparisons using ggpubr
ggboxplot(mod_sf_unique, x = "groupveg", y = "Ho",
          color = "groupveg", palette = "jco") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "anova") +
  stat_compare_means(label = "p.format", method = "t.test",
                     ref.group = "shrubland", label.y.npc = 0.9) +
  theme_classic()
dev.off()
```
